tab.emptyActive: No BOM has been uploaded to this project yet. Click “Create new” to upload one.
tab.emptyHistorical: No historical BOM versions yet. When a new BOM replaces the active one, the old version appears here.
tab.loadFailed: Could not load BOMs for this project.

detail.subtitle: Bill of materials line items
detail.notFound: This BOM could not be found.

edit.title: Edit BOM
edit.subtitle: Update line items and catalogue matches
edit.banner: Changes won’t affect existing RFQs, POs or invoices
edit.notFound: This BOM could not be found.
edit.saveError: Could not update the BOM. Please try again.

create.step1Title: Step 1 of 3: Upload your BOM file
create.step1Subtitle: Upload your bill of materials and we’ll extract its line items for review.
create.dropzoneTitle: Drag and drop a file here, or click to browse
create.dropzoneHint: Supported formats: XLSX, CSV, or PDF
create.requiredColumnsNote: The system will attempt to auto-map columns and flag unrecognised values for your review before importing.
create.sheetSelectHint: This workbook has multiple sheets. Deselect any that aren’t part of the BOM (e.g. working or scratch tabs) to avoid duplicate line items.
create.processingSubtitle: Please wait while we prepare your data for mapping
create.failedTitle: We couldn’t fully extract data from your file
create.failedSubtitle: Some information may be missing or incorrectly formatted. Please review the file or adjust mappings before continuing.
create.step2Subtitle: Check the extracted lines and match every item to a catalogue material before continuing.
create.unmatchedAlert: Unmatched items detected. All BOM line items must be matched to materials in the catalogue before proceeding. Review and resolve unmatched entries to continue.
create.step3Title: Step 3 of 3: Link BOM to project
create.step3Subtitle: Choose the project this BOM belongs to.
create.successDescription: A new BOM has been created and linked to the project {{project}}
create.createError: Could not save the BOM. Please try again.

privateMaterial.title: Create private material item
privateMaterial.subtitle: The new material is added to your company catalogue and matched to this BOM line.
privateMaterial.createError: Could not create the material. Please try again.
